concerns.title: Redaction may miss tokens in JSON logs
concerns.evidence: Redaction rules list common patterns but not JSON key names like accessToken.
concerns.suggested_test_or_fix: Add redaction for keys matching /(token|secret|password|access)/i in JSON-like text.

tests_to_add.code_snippet: def test_redact_bearer():\n    assert redact('Authorization: Bearer abc') == 'Authorization: Bearer [REDACTED]'\n

repro_notes: Try logs that include JSON blobs with token fields.
